description_long: This is a rectangular mattress with a quilted diamond pattern covering its entire surface, giving it a plush and padded appearance. The exterior is a light gray or off-white fabric, likely a soft textile, with subtle stitching that forms the diamond motif. The mattress has a uniform thickness and squared edges, with no visible handles, tags, or branding. The surface appears clean and well-maintained, with no stains or discolorations. There is a continuous edge piping running along the perimeter, providing structural definition and durability. The overall look is modern and minimal, suitable for use in a bedroom, on the street, or in a temporary urban shelter.
description: A light gray, rectangular mattress with a quilted diamond pattern and continuous edge piping. The surface is clean, soft, and visually padded.
description_view_0: Front view shows the short edge of the mattress with the diamond quilted pattern and visible edge piping.
description_view_1: Side view displays the longer edge, highlighting the uniform thickness and the continuous diamond pattern.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the short edge with the same quilted design and piping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to view 1, showing the long edge and the consistent surface pattern.
attribute_pattern_design: quilted diamond pattern, evenly distributed across the entire surface
attribute_edge_piping: Continuous edge piping in matching light gray fabric, medium thickness, running around all edges
